reason: Repository-wide hard constraints for iCTS backend edits and validation.
Placement and target rules for source/flow and test files touched by runtime instrumentation.
Naming, include hygiene, and path-scoped validation requirements for touched C++ files.
Use CTS_LOG_INFO for runtime summaries and avoid ad hoc stdout profiling.
Runtime data flows through HTreeBuilder, CharBuilder, STAAdapter-backed characterization, and test reports.
Keep instrumentation on the existing no-exception/logging-based error path.
Prefer reusing existing real-tech report helpers instead of creating parallel runtime-report infrastructure.
Reference existing per-wire-length runtime stats and sample accounting.
Reference existing real-tech runtime report style for characterization.
Reference existing H-tree artifact/report path that will carry runtime distribution data.
